summary: Maeda has flipped bullish in his most recent video, declaring that the market bottom is in and predicting Bitcoin prices will move higher.
narrative: After spending late 2025 aggressively shorting Ethereum, his latest analysis suggests a regime change where the market has likely bottomed. He now views STRC as a potential catalyst to propel BTC upward, advising viewers to look for buying opportunities rather than shorts.

tweets.text: 🎬 Closed my ETH Short. What’s Next for Crypto?
🎬 Why I’m Short $1.5M of ETH (It’s So Over)
